description: Categories grouping interchangeable dimension concepts across the OC (observation) and DC (derivation) layers. A transformation binding may reference a category instead of a concrete concept; the user selects a concrete member at study-specification time.

VisitDimension.description: Indexes observations by protocol or analysis visit. Use when a dimension can be satisfied by either the OC-level Visit (raw SDTM VISIT) or the DC-level AnalysisVisit (ADaM AVISIT), depending on the data store.

ParameterDimension.description: Indexes observations by parameter. A binding may resolve to either the OC-level Observation.Identification.Topic (the code/Topic form, e.g. SDTM --TESTCD / ADaM PARAMCD) or the DC-level Parameter (the descriptive label form, e.g. SDTM --TEST / ADaM PARAM), depending on whether the analysis runs on observation or derived data.
